executives.name: Laurans Mendelson
executives.background: Laurans A. Mendelson has served as HEICO’s Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer since 1990 and as its President from 1991 to 2024. He is also the father of Eric A. Mendelson and Victor H. Mendelson.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Eric Mendelson
executives.background: Eric A. Mendelson has served as HEICO’s Co-President since 2024 and previously as Co-President from 2009 to 2024. He has been the President of HEICO’s Flight Support Group since 1993.

executives.name: Victor Mendelson
executives.background: Victor H. Mendelson has served as HEICO’s Co-President since 2024 and previously as Co-President from 2009 to 2024. He has been the President of HEICO’s Electronic Technologies Group since 1996.

executives.name: Carlos Macau, Jr.
executives.background: Carlos L. Macau, Jr. has served as HEICO’s Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since 2012. Prior to joining HEICO, he was a partner at Deloitte & Touche LLP.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

board_of_directors.name: Laurans Mendelson
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer of HEICO since 1990.

board_of_directors.name: Eric Mendelson
board_of_directors.background: Co-President of HEICO and President of the Flight Support Group.

board_of_directors.name: Victor Mendelson
board_of_directors.background: Co-President of HEICO and President of the Electronic Technologies Group.

board_of_directors.name: Alan Schriesheim
board_of_directors.background: Retired Director and CEO of Argonne National Laboratory. He has served on the HEICO board since 1984.

board_of_directors.name: Frank Schwitter
board_of_directors.background: Retired Partner of Arthur Andersen LLP. He has served on the HEICO board since 2001.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Hildebrandt
board_of_directors.background: Managing Member of Waldman Trigoboff Hildebrandt & Calnan, P.A. He has served on the HEICO board since 2008.

board_of_directors.name: Adolfo Henriques
board_of_directors.background: Vice Chairman of Related Group. Former Chairman and CEO of Florida East Coast Industries. He joined the board in 2007.
